data.content:
The project looks fine. The command to run tests only on net9.0 is:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

The `--framework` (or `-f`) flag restricts the build and test run to the specified target framework. In this case, no test source files exist yet, so "no test available" is expected. Once you add test classes, this command will run only the net9.0 tests.
